candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Section header, but not the reported total amount line; less preferred than explicit total.
Only a component of current assets, not the total.
Only a component of current assets, not the total.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total current assets line.

candidates.why: Exact cash and cash equivalents balance sheet line; preferred over broader cash plus short-term investments.
Broader than CHE because it includes short-term investments.

variables.notes: Preferred exact cash and cash equivalents label over cash plus short-term investments.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities on the balance sheet.
Section header, not the reported total amount line.
Only a component of current liabilities.
Only a component of current liabilities.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total current liabilities line.

candidates.row_label: Short-Term Debt & Current Portion of Long-Term Debt
candidates.why: Clean total for short-term debt plus current maturities; best fit for STD and already aggregates components.
Captures only short-term debt component and would miss current portion of long-term debt if used alone.
Useful component for current maturities excluding leases, but incomplete without short-term debt and less preferred than clean total.

candidates.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases
candidates.why: Useful non-lease current maturities line, but still misses any separate short-term borrowings if used alone.

final_choice.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases

variables.notes: Did not use 'Short-Term Debt & Current Portion of Long-Term Debt' because it includes capitalized leases via the underlying current portion line. Used the minimal non-lease components instead: short-term debt plus current portion of long-term debt excluding capitalized leases.

candidates.why: Direct match for current taxes payable/current tax liabilities payable on the balance sheet.
Includes long-term and short-term combined; less appropriate than the pure short-term payable line.

variables.notes: No shortlist candidate was provided, but this exact balance-sheet tax payable line is clearly the best match.

candidates.why: Exact total net PPE line; preferred for PPEGT.

candidates.row_label: Property, Plant & Equipment - excluding Assets Leased Out - Net - Total
candidates.why: Also a total net PPE line, but slightly less standard than the main total line.
Gross PPE, less preferred than net total when net is available.

variables.notes: Preferred total net PPE over gross or specialized variants.

candidates.why: Exact match for total assets on the balance sheet.
Only a component of assets, not total assets.
Only a component of assets, not total assets.

variables.notes: Used the explicit total assets line with numeric values, not the blank section/header duplicate.

candidates.row_label: Net Cash Flow from Operating Activities
candidates.why: Exact net operating cash flow line; best match for OANCF.

candidates.row_label: Cash Flow from Operating Activities before Changes in Working Capital
candidates.why: Intermediate subtotal before working capital changes, not the final operating cash flow.
Section/header label rather than reported net cash flow amount.

final_choice.row_label: Net Cash Flow from Operating Activities

variables.notes: Selected the final net cash flow from operating activities line.
